from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_29c11459(I):
    x1 = lefthalf(I)
    x2 = righthalf(I)
    x3 = objects(x2, T, F, T)
    x4 = objects(x1, T, F, T)
    x5 = compose(hfrontier, center)
    x6 = fork(recolor, color, x5)
    x7 = mapply(x6, x4)
    x8 = paint(x1, x7)
    x9 = mapply(x6, x3)
    x10 = paint(I, x9)
    x11 = objects(x8, T, F, T)
    x12 = apply(urcorner, x11)
    x13 = shift(x12, RIGHT)
    x14 = merge(x11)
    x15 = paint(x10, x14)
    O = fill(x15, FIVE, x13)
    return O
